## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or build tooling

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npx vitest run`
- [ ] Manual browser check, if UI behavior changed

## Screenshots or recordings

Add screenshots or recordings for visible UI changes. Redact private prompts, API keys, and generated content that should not be public.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit real API keys, tokens, private endpoints, logs, or local `.env` files.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept MuseUI browser-only unless the change was explicitly discussed.
- [ ] I considered bilingual copy for shared user-facing UI.
